name: Green Field Silver Tree 绿野白银树
short_description: This game is an anime-style 3DARPG. You will control an ordinary high school student named Chodnii. You must fight with the administrators of the Great God to save your friend named Lin In the world after death
detailed_description:
You are an ordinary high school student, but you have gained spiritual power in one incident. The person who gives you the power to tell you that you must exercise yourself to defeat God.

Different Worlds

You will experience the ordinary world and the world full of spirituality, and even the world after death.

New Beginning

After you have a little strength, you start a new adventure. You will resolve the conflict between the two schools. You will recognize the true face of a gaming company. You will also commit suicide to save your friends.

Simple Battle

You only have two common combos, a normal spiritual attack, and a plain skill. However, your enemies will use a wealth of skills, you must make good use of dodge and defense

supported_languages:
English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
